steps.t: Viznak can be found near Seregost. You should talk to Viznak.
Viznak has been taken into Seregost. You should find a way inside.
Rhadrog is standing by inside the prison. You should talk to Rhadrog.
Living prisoners can be found inside the prison. You should talk to these prisoners.
Rhadrog is right next to you! You should talk to Rhadrog.
Living prisoners can be found inside the prison. You should talk to these prisoners.
Viznak is somewhere deeper in the prison. Now that you have the information you need, you should find Viznak.
The Blood-witch can be found in the deepest chamber of Seregost's prison. You should defeat the Blood-witch and her merrevail.
Bolvág the Cursed is chasing you! You should run!
You have managed to escape with Rhadrog and Viznak. You should talk to Rhadrog.
